entities.description: As a subsection of 'MQTT通信协议案例', this section provides an introduction to the MQTT communication protocol, explaining its purpose, structure, and key features.
Refers to the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport protocol, a lightweight messaging protocol used for communication in constrained environments.
Refers to the introductory section within the document that outlines the fundamental aspects of the MQTT communication protocol.

relations.description: The concept of 'MQTT通信协议' is the primary topic of section '1 MQTT通信协议简介'.
The concept of '简介' (introduction) is a structural element of section '1 MQTT通信协议简介'.
